pairs.question: When and where was Hans Westerhof born?
pairs.answer: Hans Westerhof was born on 24 November 1948 in the Netherlands.

pairs.question: What were the key roles Hans Westerhof held at Chivas de Guadalajara?
pairs.answer: Hans Westerhof joined Chivas de Guadalajara in 2003 as sporting director and later took on the additional role as head coach of the first team in October 2003. He also served as head coach of Chivas USA in 2005 and returned to Chivas de Guadalajara as head coach and sporting director afterward.

pairs.question: Which clubs did Hans Westerhof coach in the Netherlands?
pairs.answer: Hans Westerhof coached ONS Sneek, ACV, Groningen (1988–92 and 1994–96), PSV Eindhoven (1992–1994), the Netherlands U21 national team (1996–97), Ajax (2000), and Willem II (2000–03) in the Netherlands.

pairs.question: What was Hans Westerhof's coaching timeline at PSV Eindhoven?
pairs.answer: Hans Westerhof managed PSV Eindhoven from 1992 to 1994.

pairs.question: How did Hans Westerhof's coaching career in Mexico begin?
pairs.answer: Westerhof's coaching career in Mexico began in 2003 when he joined Chivas de Guadalajara as sporting director and later became head coach. He also coached Necaxa during the Apertura 2007 season.

pairs.question: What role did Hans Westerhof have at Vitesse?
pairs.answer: Hans Westerhof was appointed as Vitesse's head coach on 12 June 2008, but his tenure lasted only until December 2008 when he was fired.

pairs.question: Besides coaching, what other professional role did Hans Westerhof hold?
pairs.answer: Besides coaching, Hans Westerhof worked as a teacher at the Central Institute for Sports Education (CIOS) in Heerenveen, the Netherlands, for many years.
